name: EchoStar CORP
summary: EchoStar Corporation is a Nevada-incorporated holding company trading on NASDAQ under 'SATS'. Through subsidiaries including DISH Network and DISH DBS, it provides Pay-TV, broadband, and wireless services. It operates a 5G wireless network, holds FCC spectrum licenses, and offers satellite-based services. The company is pursuing asset sales to AT&T and SpaceX amid FCC regulatory pressure regarding spectrum utilization.
